title: Unified Viability Architecture Stack
canonical_statement: The unified viability architecture organizes through recursively coupled layers governing existence, accessibility, continuity, transport, deformation, participatory traversability, and integrated adaptive viability dynamics.

field_geometry_extension.title: Recursive Participatory Viability Field Geometry
field_geometry_extension.canonical_statement: Viability behaves as a recursively evolving participatory field geometry over recoverable continuity topology.
field_geometry_extension.interpretation: The primary viability field governing participatory continuity preservation across recoverable future-fiber topology.
field_geometry_extension.one_sentence_lock: Viability organizes through recursively recoverable participatory traversability geometry.

master_viability_geometric_object.name: master_viability_geometric_object
master_viability_geometric_object.viability_equation: Viability = preserved participatory traversability through recursively recoverable continuity topology.
master_viability_geometric_object.collapse_dual: Collapse = degeneration of recursively recoverable participatory traversability geometry.

architecture_layers.name: Generalized Adaptive Viability Theory
architecture_layers.governing_role: Defines the existential viability conditions governing persistent adaptive existence.

architecture_layers.name: Recoverable Accessibility Geometry
architecture_layers.governing_role: Governs recoverable future accessibility geometry and future reachability structure.

architecture_layers.name: Recursive Viability Topology
architecture_layers.governing_role: Governs admissible continuity preservation across recursive future-fiber topology.

architecture_layers.name: Spectral Coordination Theory
architecture_layers.governing_role: Governs transport propagation, coordination continuity, and recursive participation dynamics.

architecture_layers.name: Polyrhythmic Margin Model
architecture_layers.governing_question: What deforms and prunes accessibility structure?
architecture_layers.governing_role: Governs recursive deformation burden, compression, and accessibility pruning dynamics.

architecture_layers.name: Recursive Participatory Viability Field Geometry
architecture_layers.governing_question: How does viability evolve as a participatory field over recoverable continuity topology?
architecture_layers.governing_role: Governs local viability density, viability flux, accessibility curvature, pruning, rewovability, transport connection, and continuity singularity structure.

architecture_layers.name: Viable Transformation Flow Architecture
architecture_layers.governing_question: How do all viability layers recursively co-organize?
architecture_layers.governing_role: Synthesizes the coupled viability architecture into unified recursive adaptive viability geometry.

canonical_ordering.formal_order: Ontology -> Geometry -> Topology -> Transport -> Pressure -> Field Geometry -> Integrated Viability Architecture
canonical_ordering.interpretation: Existential viability conditions generate accessibility geometry, which constrains admissible continuity topology, which supports transport propagation dynamics, which undergo deformation pressure dynamics, which induces field-geometric viability structure, all synthesized through integrated viability architecture.

cross_layer_relations.GAVT_to_RAG: Existential viability depends on preservation of recoverable future reachability geometry.
cross_layer_relations.RAG_to_RVT: Recoverable accessibility geometry constrains admissible continuity topology.
cross_layer_relations.RVT_to_SCT: Admissible continuity topology governs viable transport propagation dynamics.
cross_layer_relations.SCT_to_PMM: Transport continuity dynamics accumulate recursive deformation burden under sustained participation.
cross_layer_relations.PMM_to_RAG: Recursive deformation pressure prunes recoverable future accessibility structure.
cross_layer_relations.PMM_to_RPVFG: Recursive deformation pressure induces accessibility curvature, traversability pruning, and continuity singularities within participatory viability field geometry.
cross_layer_relations.SCT_to_RPVFG: Transport propagation generates viability flux and stabilizes coherent participatory traversability.
cross_layer_relations.RVT_to_RPVFG: Continuity admissibility constrains viable field evolution across recoverable continuity topology.
cross_layer_relations.RPVFG_to_VTFA: Recursive participatory viability field geometry provides the local field-theoretic structure for integrated adaptive viability synthesis.
cross_layer_relations.VTFA_global_relation: VTFA integrates ontology, geometry, topology, transport, deformation, field geometry, and recovery into unified recursive viability architecture.

primary_viability_field_geometry.canonical_compression: Viability behaves as a recursively evolving participatory field geometry.

local_viability_density.definition: Local density of admissibly recoverable participatory traversability surrounding recursively indexed state (x,t).
local_viability_density.interpretation: High viability density corresponds to richly connected recoverable future participation structure.

viability_flux.definition: Transport propagation of participatory viability across recoverable future-fiber topology.
viability_flux.interpretation: Governs directional propagation, transport continuity, and accessibility transmission across recursive participation structure.

accessibility_curvature.definition: Geometric deformation of recoverable accessibility topology under recursive burden accumulation.
accessibility_curvature.interpretation: High accessibility curvature corresponds to compression, branching distortion, or continuity pinching across future-fiber geometry.

traversability_pruning_operator.definition: Operator acting on recoverable future accessibility structure by removing, compressing, or disconnecting admissible future traversability pathways under recursive deformation pressure.
traversability_pruning_operator.interpretation: Formalizes constraint-induced pruning of participatory futures.

rewovability_tensor.definition: Reconnectability strength between fragmented or compressed future-fiber accessibility regions.
rewovability_tensor.interpretation: High rewovability corresponds to strong regenerative reconnection capacity across recoverable continuity topology.

transport_connection_structure.definition: Connection structure governing admissible propagation of participatory continuity across recoverable future-fiber geometry.
transport_connection_structure.interpretation: Determines coherent viability transportability under recursive deformation dynamics.

continuity_singularities.definition: Regions where recoverable participatory traversability degenerates, disconnects, or becomes non-admissibly compressed.
continuity_singularities.interpretation: Organizes collapse pinching, fragmentation boundaries, and accessibility exhaustion structure across recursive viability geometry.

governing_principles: Existence persists by preserving future reachability.
Recursive temporality emerges through coherent participatory traversability.
Viability organizes through recursively recoverable participatory traversability geometry.
Viability behaves as a recursively evolving participatory field geometry.
canonical_compressions: Ontology -> Geometry -> Topology -> Transport -> Pressure -> Field Geometry -> Integrated Viability Architecture
Existence persists through preservation of future reachability.
Recovery reconnects fragmented future participation structure.
Viability is recursively transportable participatory accessibility.
Viability organizes through recursively recoverable participatory traversability geometry.
Viability = preserved participatory traversability through recursively recoverable continuity topology.
Collapse = degeneration of recursively recoverable participatory traversability geometry.
deep_compressions: Recursive participatory viability field geometry governs local viability field observables.
VTFA synthesizes recursive adaptive viability architecture.
Recursive temporality emerges through coherent traversability.

phase_transition_marker.statement: The architecture now admits local viability field observables suitable for Phase II mathematical formalization.

one_sentence_lock: The unified viability architecture organizes through recursively coupled layers governing existential viability, accessibility geometry, continuity topology, transport dynamics, deformation pressure, participatory viability field geometry, and integrated adaptive viability synthesis.
